name: Cloudgate CRM
description: A complete CRM built on Cloudgate (React + Vite + Tailwind). Track leads, manage a sales pipeline, log activities and tasks, manage companies and contacts, and run mass email campaigns with SendGrid. Fully behind Cloudgate IdP auth, with all data served by Cloudgate workflow APIs.

workflowImport.description: Creates the CRM controller (project path 'crm') with its SQLite database and all workflow endpoints the app calls at runtime.
workflowImport.publishHint: Import the bundle, create the 'crm_db' SQLite database and run .template/schema.sql, then publish all CRM endpoints to sandbox. Verify POST /sbx/crm/dashboard returns stats.
